// 01 · ABOUT

About Me

Current CGPA
Kongu Engineering College · B.E. ECE

I am an Electronics and Communication Engineering student at Kongu Engineering College with a strong interest in VLSI Design.

I enjoy designing digital circuits, implementing hardware using Verilog HDL, and exploring modern VLSI design methodologies.

I am continuously improving my knowledge in RTL design, FPGA implementation, synthesis, and physical design — building the skills needed to contribute at companies shaping the future of semiconductors.

// 03 · PROJECTS

Featured Work

⚙️
IEEE 754 Floating Point Multiplier
Designed and implemented a single-precision IEEE 754 Floating Point Multiplier using Verilog HDL. Simulated and verified using ModelSim with optimized datapath architecture.
Verilog HDLModelSimVivado
💡
Street Light Fault Detection System
Developed an IoT-based street light fault detection system using Arduino for automatic monitoring and fault identification in real time.
ArduinoEmbedded SystemsIoT
💧
Saline Bottle Monitoring System
Designed an automated system that continuously monitors saline levels and provides timely alerts to healthcare staff, improving patient safety.
ArduinoEmbedded SystemsHealthcare Tech
🏭
FabTrack: Intelligent Bedsheet Classification System
ESP32-CAM + IR sensor + conveyor belt system with CNN-based deep learning to classify Cotton, Silk, and Polyester in real time, with IoT database integration for inventory tracking.
ESP32-CAMDeep LearningCNNIoT
